nasb.text: The word that came to Jeremiah concerning all the people of Judah, in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah (that was the first year of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon),

esv.text: The word that came to Jeremiah concerning all the people of Judah, in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah (that was the first year of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon),

cnv.text: 猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬第四年，就是巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒第一年，有話臨到耶利米，是關於猶大眾民的。

ccb.text: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬执政第四年，即巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒元年，耶和华告诉了耶利米有关犹大百姓的事。
